title: Dekton 400W Jigsaw-Powerful & Compact| Adjustable Speed Control| Orbital Cutting Action| Includes Blade & Dust Extraction| Ideal for Wood, Metal, Plastic| Comfort Ergonomic Handle| Precision Cutting
features: Powerful & Compact Design: Experience the perfect blend of power and portability with the Dekton 400W Jigsaw. Its 400-watt motor provides robust cutting performance, capable of tackling a variety of materials including wood, metal, and plastic, making it ideal for both professional projects and DIY tasks.

Adjustable Speed Control for Precision: Tailor your cutting speed to the specific material at hand with the adjustable speed control feature. Whether you're making delicate cuts in soft wood or tackling tougher materials like metal, the Dekton jigsaw lets you choose the optimal speed for precision and efficiency.

Versatile Orbital Cutting Action: Achieve smooth, curved, or straight cuts with the jigsaw’s versatile orbital cutting action. The adjustable orbital settings allow you to switch between aggressive cuts for rapid material removal and more refined settings for detailed work, ensuring you have the right tool for any cutting application.

Comprehensive Kit with Blade & Dust Extraction: The Dekton 400W Jigsaw comes equipped with a high-quality blade, ready for immediate use. Additionally, the built-in dust extraction port helps maintain a clean work environment by efficiently removing dust and debris as you cut, improving visibility and reducing cleanup time.

Ergonomic Comfort Handle: Work longer with less fatigue thanks to the jigsaw’s comfort ergonomic handle. Designed to fit comfortably in your hand, it provides a secure grip and reduces vibration, ensuring greater control and comfort during extended use, making it perfect for both intricate work and larger projects.
description: The Dekton 400W Jigsaw is a powerful, compact tool designed to handle a wide range of cutting tasks with precision and ease. Whether you're working with wood, metal, or plastic, this versatile jigsaw delivers exceptional performance, making it an essential addition to any toolbox. The 400W motor provides ample power for smooth and efficient cutting, allowing you to tackle projects both big and small with confidence. One of the standout features of this jigsaw is its adjustable speed control, which lets you fine-tune the cutting speed to match the material you're working with. This ensures optimal results, whether you're making quick rough cuts or precise, detailed ones. The orbital cutting action adds to the tool's versatility, allowing for faster cuts through thicker materials while minimizing the effort required. Included with the jigsaw is a high-quality blade, designed to deliver clean, accurate cuts every time. Additionally, the jigsaw is equipped with a dust extraction feature, helping to keep your workspace clean and free from debris. This not only enhances visibility during cutting but also contributes to a safer working environment. Ergonomically designed for comfort, the Dekton 400W Jigsaw features a soft-grip handle that reduces hand fatigue, even during extended use. The handle's design also allows for better control and maneuverability, ensuring that each cut is precise and in line with your project's requirements. Ideal for a variety of materials, this jigsaw excels in cutting through wood, metal, and plastic with ease.
